attention_lanes.plain: Soulaana: Review risky sessions, new devices, failed attempts, and anything that smells like forced entry.
attention_lanes.title: Access risk

attention_lanes.next: Check export requests after access risk.
attention_lanes.plain: Soulaana: Exports are how information leaves the building. Approve only what belongs, redact what is too sensitive, and deny anything unclear.
attention_lanes.title: Protected exports

attention_lanes.plain: Soulaana: Admin changes decide who can touch doors later. Match actor, target, permission, and reason.
attention_lanes.title: Admin keys

attention_lanes.next: Review open door access issues before deeper archive work.
attention_lanes.plain: Soulaana: These are the door swipes that rose above quiet receipts and became owner-review items. Start here if the count is not zero.
attention_lanes.title: Door access inbox

attention_lanes.next: Review repeated denies or wrong-door attempts first.
attention_lanes.plain: Soulaana: Every Tower door swipe leaves a receipt now. Allowed, denied, wrong-door, and missing-key attempts are visible without exposing raw keycards.
attention_lanes.title: Door-swipe receipts

attention_lanes.next: Open only when you need the story behind a decision.
attention_lanes.plain: Soulaana: Evidence capsules preserve the why. They are the receipts.
attention_lanes.title: Evidence capsules

workflow.action: Review devices, failed attempts, rapid denials, and session risk.

workflow.why: Unsafe sessions can touch everything else if they get through.
